summary: Top Movers Scanner enhancement fully verified. All backend APIs return correct data with source tags and pipeline stats. Frontend displays Top Movers Scanner panel with Injected/Passed Prefilter/DT Candidates/Watchlist metrics. Active Movers section shows symbols with G/L/A source tags. Pipeline Summary includes 'top movers' count. Source badges (TOP GAINER/TOP LOSER/MOST ACTIVE) visible on candidates.

backend_tests.auth_access: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
backend_tests.top_movers_scan: PASS - GET /api/top-movers/scan returns accepted symbols with source tags (top_gainer/top_loser/most_active) and pipeline stats (raw_gainers, raw_losers, raw_actives, filtered counts, rejections_by_reason)
backend_tests.top_movers_status: PASS - GET /api/top-movers/status returns has_data, accepted_count, config (max_gainers=30, max_losers=30, max_actives=20, price_range=$5.0-$50.0, min_volume=500,000, min_market_cap=$100M)
backend_tests.top_movers_performance: PASS - GET /api/top-movers/performance returns daily performance summary with date, total_scans, unique_accepted_symbols
backend_tests.auto_trade_scan_top_movers_block: PASS - GET /api/auto-trade/scan returns top_movers block with injected/in_prefilter/as_candidates/as_watchlist counts
backend_tests.auto_trade_scan_stats: PASS - scan stats include top_movers_injected and top_movers_in_prefilter fields
backend_tests.rejection_reasons_grouped: PASS - Rejection reasons are grouped (e.g., 'Price > $50.0', 'Volume too low') not individual values
backend_tests.quality_filters_config: PASS - Config shows correct filter values: price $5-$50, volume 500K, market cap $100M, 2% min change

frontend_tests.access_gate: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
frontend_tests.auto_trade_page_load: PASS - Auto Trade page loads with AI Auto-Trade header
frontend_tests.top_movers_scanner_panel: PASS - Panel visible with Injected (20), Passed Prefilter (20), DT Candidates (1), Watchlist (3)
frontend_tests.active_movers_section: PASS - Shows symbols with G/L/A source tags (HP, RSI, LOCO, CLB, DOW, NTCT, FSLY, KGC, APA, KALV, HAL, U, CRK, WES, DK, BORR, IAG, VECO, LBRT, CLMT)
frontend_tests.source_badges_legend: PASS - Legend shows 'G=Gainer L=Loser A=Active | Green=Candidate Amber=Watchlist'
frontend_tests.green_badges_candidates: PASS - Green badges visible for candidates (APA, KALV, U, BORR)
frontend_tests.amber_badges_watchlist: PASS - Amber badges visible for watchlist symbols
frontend_tests.pipeline_summary_top_movers: PASS - Pipeline Summary shows '20 top movers' in flow: 1083 scanned → 20 top movers → 20 momentum filter → 20 TA analyzed → 6 setups → 3 passed → 1 DT candidates
frontend_tests.aggressive_momentum_strategy_panel: PASS - All parameters visible: Price Range $5.0-$50.0, Min RelVol 1.5x, Min ATR 2.0%, Confidence 61, Position Sizing tiers, Max Trades/Day 8, Stop Loss -1.5%, Take Profit +3.0%, Partial Profit 1.5%, Max Daily Loss -3.0%, Hard Stop 3 losses, Cooldown 30min
frontend_tests.day_tab_candidates: PASS - Day tab shows candidates with TOP GAINER badges (U, DOW, IAG)
frontend_tests.source_badges_on_candidates: PASS - TOP GAINER badges visible on U, DOW, IAG candidates

features_verified: GET /api/top-movers/scan returns accepted symbols with source tags and pipeline stats
GET /api/auto-trade/scan returns top_movers block with injected/in_prefilter/as_candidates counts
scan stats include top_movers_injected and top_movers_in_prefilter fields
Rejection reasons grouped (e.g., 'Price > $50.0' not individual prices)
Top Movers Scanner panel visible with Injected/Passed Prefilter/DT Candidates/Watchlist metrics
Active Movers section shows symbols with G/L/A source tags
Green badges for candidates, amber for watchlist symbols
Pipeline Summary includes 'top movers' count in the pipeline flow
Aggressive Momentum Strategy panel shows all parameters correctly
Day tab shows candidates with source badges (TOP GAINER/TOP LOSER/MOST ACTIVE)
critical_code_review_comments: TopMoversScanner class correctly implements FMP + DB fallback for fetching top gainers/losers/actives
Quality filters correctly applied: $5-50 price, 500K volume, 2% min change, $100M market cap
Caps correctly set: 30 gainers + 30 losers + 20 actives
Rejection reasons properly grouped in rejections_by_reason dict
Source tags (top_gainer/top_loser/most_active) correctly assigned to accepted symbols
Frontend correctly displays source badges on ExplanationCard component
Pipeline Summary correctly shows top movers count in the flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top Movers Scanner feature fully verified. FMP API returns 403 (key tier limitation) so scanner falls back to computing movers from trading_signals MongoDB collection - this is expected behavior. Currently finding ~20 top movers from DB data. Market was closed during testing. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend displays all Top Movers Scanner UI components correctly including source badges on candidates.

notes.fmp_fallback: FMP top gainers/losers/actives endpoints return 403 due to API key tier limitation. Scanner correctly falls back to computing movers from existing trading_signals collection in MongoDB.
notes.current_top_movers: 20 symbols injected from DB fallback: HP, RSI, LOCO, CLB, DOW, NTCT, FSLY, KGC, APA, KALV, HAL, U, CRK, WES, DK, BORR, IAG, VECO, LBRT, CLMT
